claims.text: The total number of participants across two user studies was 458.
GPT-4o predicts 11 of 50 features for everyday people with at least 60% accuracy.
claims.source_quote: GPT-4o predicts 11 of 50 features for everyday people with $\ge$60\% accuracy

claims.text: Participants report wanting control over LLM-generated associations despite not considering all outputs privacy violations.
claims.source_quote: participants report wanting control over LLM-generated associations despite not considering all outputs privacy violations

claims.text: LMP2 is a browser-based self-audit tool introduced in this work.
claims.source_quote: we report interim findings from an ongoing study and introduce LMP2, a browser-based self-audit tool

claims.text: The probing method was validated by evaluating eight LLMs on public figures and non-existent names.
claims.source_quote: To validate our probing method, we evaluate eight LLMs on public figures and non-existent names

claims.text: Evaluation of eight LLMs on public figures and non-existent names shows clear separation between stable name-conditioned associations and model defaults.
claims.source_quote: observing clear separation between stable name-conditioned associations and model defaults

claims.text: Nine frictions were identified that emerged in the study.
claims.source_quote: we identify nine frictions that emerged in our study

claims.text: Large language models learn statistical associations from massive training corpora and user interactions.
claims.source_quote: Large language models (LLMs) learn statistical associations from massive training corpora and user interactions

claims.text: Deployed LLM systems can surface or infer information about individuals.
claims.source_quote: deployed systems can surface or infer information about individuals

claims.text: People lack practical ways to inspect what a model associates with their name.
claims.source_quote: Yet people lack practical ways to inspect what a model associates with their name

claims.text: The study was conducted across two user studies.
When LLM outputs are probabilistic, context-dependent, and user-mediated through elicitation, what model-individual associations include is under-specified.
claims.source_quote: when outputs are probabilistic, context-dependent, and user-mediated through elicitation, what model--individual associations even include is under-specified

claims.text: Operationalisation of LLM privacy audits relies on crafting probes and metrics that are hard to validate or compare.
claims.source_quote: operationalisation relies on crafting probes and metrics that are hard to validate or compare
